COMPLEX LITIGATION, DEPT. 613, PREVIOUSLY SUBMITTED ON FEB-06-2020, THE COURT NOW GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIV. PROC.
